title: Chapter 113
content:
Chapter 113: Serve

Step! Step!

Maria walked over to the bucket resting at the side of the kitchen.

Bending over, she crouched down and dipped the cup in her hand into the bucket, scooping up some water.

As she bent forward, Denzel couldn’t help but admire her supple figure. The thin dress she wore clung tightly to her body, outlining every curve. However, it failed to shield the quite obvious subtle jiggles of her succulent flesh.

And as she remained bent over, from where he stood, he could even catch a glimpse of her white panties which did it’s best to shield her pussy which he knew deeply belonged to him.

A slow smile crept across his face.

’Look at her... shaking that ass right in front of me. She’s completely focused on cooking for me will dressed like that. Doesn’t she know her dear son is a vicious animal ready to take her ass at any time?’

He thought maniacally as he simply stood there, silently watching her.

Once she had filled the cup, Maria stood up, returned to the pot, and gently poured the water into the stew she was preparing.

"Sorry." she said softly.

"I’m almost done. It just needs to boil a few more times, and then it’ll be ready."

Denzel smiled.

"That’s okay, ma. I’m a very patient boy."

"Are you now?" Maria muttered as she flickered a glance at him.

However, perhaps it was just a plain feeling, or perhaps it was just an observation, but right as her eyes landed on Denzel she could feel a hunger, the same pulsing which he had used to pulverize her on their first night together.

’W-Why is he looking at me like th-th-that.’

Almost immediately, Maria’s heart beat just a little faster as the faint blush on her cheek could visibly be seen.

’Sophia is should still be asleep...yeah, she hasn’t woken up yet...Which means it’s just me and him.’

She immediately returned her gaze back the food which she was preparing.

’I’m honestly excited just to have this moment alone with him, to be very honest. But I...we have to be careful. I don’t want us to get caught like last time. We really shouldn’t be careless.’

A few minutes later, she finally finished cooking the stew.

After setting the pot aside, she turned toward Denzel with a gentle smile.

"Do you want me to serve you?"

For the past several minutes, Denzel had done little more than stare at her ass from behind, quietly admiring the generous view before him.

He slowly licked his lips before replying.

"Yes mummy...I’d like that quite a lot, please."

"Okay." Maria answered with a shy smile.

She crouched down and lifted the lid off the pot before taking one of the wooden bowls which was available to serve the stew.

"I just need to do this quickly before I head off to work."

A faint blush still lingered across her cheeks as she spoke.

"Sorry, but I have quite the busy day waiting for at work...so I can’t spend long here." She added.

But Denzel, staring so calmly at her only had a single thought going through his head.

’You’re not going anywhere, bitch.’

"Oh, and I kinda woke up a bit late...So I didn’t really have enough time to add any meat stock."

"That’s okay," Denzel replied.

By then, the distance between them had completely vanished.

Without another word, Denzel reached out and placed his hand firmly against her fat ass.

Ohh~

The instant his palm landed on it, a soft exclamation slipped from Maria’s lips, and her cheeks immediately flushed an even deeper shade of red.

Maria slowly lifted her eyes and offered Denzel a weak smile.

She gently bit her lower lip, trying her best to steady herself.

"Dear son..."

Without another word, Denzel gave her ass another firm squeeze.

"Is something wrong?" he asked, leaning in until there was barely any space between them.

By now, his cock had already begun to harden. His hands continued to roam over her ass, kneading it slowly.

Maria found herself completely unable to control her reactions.

"N-No... There’s nothing wrong at all."

A faint smile appeared on Denzel’s face.

"That’s right...that’s what I want to hear as you yield to me."

The instant those words left his lips, the familiar system notification echoed in his mind.

[Activation phrase used.]

[Skill is now in use.]

Without hesitation, Denzel gave her ass another squeeze.

Immediately, a soft cry escaped Maria’s lips, her entire body nearly trembling from the sensation.

"My goodness..."

Her legs quivered beneath her.

A relieved, breathless chuckle slipped from her lips as she instinctively reached behind herself, wrapping both arms around Denzel’s back.

Then, almost unconsciously, she pushed her big ass back against Denzel’s cock.

Denzel’s eyes widened ever so slightly.

"Oh...You like that?"

He continued kneading her ass with both hands.

"Yes... Denzel...Oh... yes..."

As the words left her mouth, she slowly began rocking her hips, pressing her ass rhythmically against Denzel’s cock.

Denzel’s hands gradually slid upward, moving from her ass to her waist before slowly traveling along her arms.

"You said something about not putting any meat stock in my stew, right? How could you do that to your lover?"

"I mean... don’t you want me to have some protein in my food?"

Maria’s breathing became heavier with every passing second.

"I’m so sorry, my love..mI was just...I was just in a hurry. I... I didn’t know what to do."

A small smile spread across Denzel’s face.

"Really? Then right now... I’m about to show you what to do.You see... I’m going to need some protein in my stew."

"And since you didn’t make up for it by adding any meat stock after I’d already provided the money, then you’re going to have to make up for it in whatever other ways you can."

Denzel muttered the words in a low voice before immediately reaching for the top of her dress and pulling it down. In one smooth motion, her huge tits spilled free, her pointy nipples already swollen, as though they had been waiting just for him.
